confirmed.note: M5 shell-panel scaffolding: 4 plugins (chart/radar/video/cuascontrol) created in ONE commit, each plugin's panelfactories.cpp/panelwidget.cpp/plugin.cpp byte-identical after stripping the module name. plugin.cpp of chart vs video is a pure rename copy (empty diff after s/chart//,s/video//). Classic AI 4x copy-from-template.

Account/Group API mirror by copy-rename within one file: getAccount(129-138) vs getGroup(197-206) identical after Account->Group; allAccountIds/allGroupIds, deleteAccount/deleteGroup (Group adds a back-unbind loop = partial-edited), grantModule/revokeModule share the same id/moduleId validation boilerplate.
deleteAccount copied to deleteGroup, then extended with a reverse-unbind loop over m_accounts that clears permissionId. Body otherwise identical -> copy-then-edit.

intro_commits.reason: NOT author-introduced. 5393e3b1 is a 12598-file bulk folder rename of the entire vendored Qt Creator 4.13.3 tree. The bidirectional p.h<->p.h include is pre-existing upstream Qt Company code (header: Copyright (C) 2016 The Qt Company Ltd.). The single commit merely imported/renamed it.

cycle.evidence: qtcreator/hldplugin-src/src/plugins/coreplugin/actionmanager/{actioncontainer_p.h,actionmanager_p.h} -- vendored Qt Creator, Copyright (C) 2016 The Qt Company Ltd. Repo is a renamed/pruned Qt Creator fork; cycle is in vendor code, not author code.
